name: Son Martorellet (the pure Menorcan horse breed)
description: A 14-hectare stud farm devoted since 1997 to the Menorcan horse, the soul of the island's festivals. Between the visit to the stables and the 'Somni' equestrian show, children discover Menorcan culture in its most vivid form.

highlights: see Menorcan stallions and mares up close in their paddocks
attend the 'Somni' equestrian show or the guided tour of the grounds
book your place (tickets via Eventbrite); open from May to October
